features.summaryKey: Track 1RM, rep-max, and volume PRs with sparkline charts, delta badges, reward tiers, confetti celebrations, and shareable cards.
Five-axis sleep scoring with breathing disturbance tracking, nocturnal vitals, WASO analysis, and sleep-exercise correlation insights.
See cumulative stress scores, daily digest summaries, and time-aware sections that adapt throughout your day.
Real-time duration tracking replaces manual input for timed exercises — on both iPhone and Apple Watch.
Skip or start exercises during template workouts with dedicated buttons, replacing the old auto-advance timer.
